comments.author: @elusiveplatypus-w1z
comments.text: I am Gen X and female and was born and raised in Texas. I am now living in California. I went to a farmers market and saw something very unusual and rare indeed. I am half Asian and I saw a full blooded Asian Male at a mushroom stand that sold none hallucinogenic mushrooms and when he spoke to me me he sounded like a cross between a surfer dude and Wayne from the movie Wayne's World. Something else was strange about him. He was Asian but his name was Carl. My Asian mom named me Tiffany. What happened to Asian people naming their kids Asian names??
